tasks.label: Run DEV
tasks.command: dart run flutter_launcher_icons -f flutter_launcher_icons-dev.yaml; flutter run --flavor dev

tasks.label: Build QA APK
tasks.command: dart run flutter_launcher_icons -f flutter_launcher_icons-qa.yaml; flutter build apk --flavor qa --release

tasks.label: Build PROD Bundle
tasks.command: dart run flutter_launcher_icons -f flutter_launcher_icons-prod.yaml; flutter build appbundle --flavor production --release
